## Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Run '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## Expected behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior
What actually happened. Include error messages, logs, or screenshots.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, KOOMPI OS, Arch Linux]
- Install method: [e.g. `curl https://nimmit.koompi.ai | bash`]
- Version: [run `openclaw --version`]
- Model: [e.g. gemini-3.1-pro, claude-opus-4.6]

## Logs
```bash
# Please include relevant logs
journalctl --user -u openclaw -n 50
```

## Additional context
Add any other context about the problem here.
